name: task-management-basic
description: Generate a basic task management view with CRUD operations
prompt:
Generate an Orbital schema for a task management app.

Entity: Task with fields:
- title (string, required)
- status (enum: pending/active/done)
- priority (enum: low/medium/high)

Requirements:
1. List view with search and item actions (view, edit, delete)
2. Modal form for creating/editing tasks
3. Use atomic composition with stack layouts
4. Include stats/overview section with static labels (Total, Pending, Active, Done) - use static text only, NOT computed bindings
5. Use theme variables for all visual properties
6. Single render-ui effect per transition
7. CRITICAL: Use ONLY valid bindings: @entity.field, @payload.field, @state, @now, @config. NEVER invent bindings like @count or @count:status=value
